subject: Use Frankfurt release of dmaap-bc
commit_message:
Use Frankfurt release of dmaap-bc

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1363
Signed-off-by: Dominic Lunanuova <dgl@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I198b19a24f2b413f489376eb101efa75a4513ba0
